description: User reads the task instructions presented on the screen regarding booking a return domestic flight on the Flight Centre website.
frame_description: The screen displays a series of text-based instructions for a usability testing task.

description: The instruction text on the screen updates dynamically, progressively revealing the details of the user's task.
frame_description: Text on the dark background changes as the automated session guide presents the scenario.

description: A 'Pop-up blocked' notification appears in the browser's address bar as the system attempts to open the target website.
frame_description: A small icon indicating a blocked pop-up is visible at the right end of the URL input field.

description: The browser navigates from the Askable session instructions to the Flight Centre homepage.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the dark instruction page to the Flight Centre website.

description: The Flight Centre website begins to load, displaying skeleton UI elements and promotional banners.
frame_description: The Flight Centre homepage is visible with some content still in a loading state.
